message:
Implement HTTP host bridge for WASM networking

This enables WASM applications to make HTTP requests through the host
instead of requiring WASI socket extensions (which need plugins).

Host side (edgebox_run.zig):
- Added edgebox_http module with request/get_response_len/get_response
- Uses curl subprocess for actual HTTP requests (reliable, supports HTTPS)
- Handles JSON response encoding with proper escaping

WASM side (wasm_main_static.zig):
- Added extern imports from edgebox_http module
- nativeFetch now calls host bridge instead of WASI sockets
- Parses JSON response from host and returns to JavaScript

Architecture:
1. JS calls globalThis.fetch() -> runtime polyfill
2. Polyfill calls __edgebox_fetch() -> nativeFetch in Zig
3. nativeFetch calls host bridge imports (request, get_response)
4. Host makes real HTTP request via curl
5. Response flows back through the stack

Tested: HTTP requests to statsig.anthropic.com work successfully.
